supported_subset_rows.title: RTI shall invoke Report Interaction Transportation Type for the currently implemented reliable and best-effort transport subset.
supported_subset_rows.vendor_notes: shared transportation-type scenario verifies Pitch interaction transport report callbacks in the supported subset
